mapper.insert: /*TC_ECS_DOC_CLS_CD_Dao_insertDocClsCd*/ INSERT INTO TC_ECS_DOC_CLS_CD ( DOC_CLS_CD, DOC_CLS_NM, UPPER_DOC_CLS_CD, SYS_DIV_CD, FILE_MAIN_PATH, MENU_ID, FRST_REGIST_DT, FRST_RGSTR_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{docClsCd}, #{docClsNm}, #{upperDocClsCd}, #{sysDivCd}, #{fileMainPath}, #{menuId}, SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )
mapper.select: /*TC_ECS_DOC_CLS_CD_Dao_selectDocClsInfo*/ SELECT A.DOC_CLS_CD, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TM_ECS_ATCHFL WHERE DOC_CLS_CD = A.DOC_CLS_CD ) AS USE_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TC_ECS_DOC_CLS_CD WHERE UPPER_DOC_CLS_CD = A.DOC_CLS_CD ) AS DOC_CNT FROM TC_ECS_DOC_CLS_CD A WHERE A.DOC_CLS_CD = #{docClsCd}

/*TC_ECS_DOC_CLS_CD_Dao_selectDocSavePath*/ SELECT REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE(FILE_MAIN_PATH, '년', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY')), '월', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'MM')), '일', TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD')) AS FILE_MAIN_PATH FROM TC_ECS_DOC_CLS_CD WHERE DOC_CLS_CD = #{docClsCd}
